title: 炸裂、エル・スペシャル！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, a petty argument between El Condor
Pasa and Seeking the Pearl escalates into a
wrestling showdown!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We may be doing this for fun, but as long as it's
wrestling...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Then I'm gonna go all out!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Heh! I certainly hope so! Now come... let's see
how your skills hold up on the world stage!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Of course they do! One day, my name will be
known the world over!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, this seems dangerous. You should quit before
it's too late...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No way! I'll never turn down a challenge! I've got
the blood of a fighter in me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's do this, Pearl!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ A big tackle like that isn't going to work
on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeking the Pearl takes a big step back and
avoids El Condor Pasa's attack! The audience's
eyes are glued on the action.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... It's not over yet!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... You can't touch this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeking the Pearl dodges another tackle from El
Condor Pasa, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
(Ha! She's dodging with big steps to the outside.
If I make a sharp dive from the inside...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa runs into a leap!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Take this! El Especiaaalll!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa steps swiftly behind Seeking the
Pearl and puts her in an armlock.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Uncle! Uncle! I give up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! Victoria! My first victory with the El
Especial!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What in the world are you all doing?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
El, I want to see you in the student council office
later. Pearl, you can join us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa gets a rather stern lecture, but her
movements have also developed a decisive edge
from her match.
